summary: Detailed implementation plan to rebuild blueprint + key_data + phase_plan for the new Ship Biography framework. Covers 4 files that need changing: (1) JSON framework steps, (2) Blueprint research prompt sections, (3) Phase plan prompt mapping + key_data classification, (4) Outline prompt phases. Shows exact before/after for each file with new phase definitions, new key_data classification rules, and new blueprint sections aligned to the ship lifecycle arc.
